## Build, Test & Lint

```bash
# TODO: Add your commands here, e.g.:
# npm install        # install dependencies
# npm run build      # build the project
# npm run test       # run all tests
# npm run test -- path/to/single.test.ts  # run a single test
# npm run lint       # lint the codebase
```

## Architecture

<!-- Describe the high-level structure: key layers, entry points, data flow, external services. -->
<!-- Example:
- `src/` contains the application source; entry point is `src/index.ts`
- API layer in `src/api/` calls services in `src/services/`, which interact with `src/db/`
- Configuration is loaded from `.env` via `src/config.ts` and used throughout
-->

## Key Conventions

<!-- Document patterns specific to this codebase that aren't obvious from a single file. -->
<!-- Example:
- All database queries go through the repository pattern in `src/repositories/`
- Errors are thrown as custom classes from `src/errors.ts` and caught in the top-level handler
- Feature flags are read from `config.featureFlags` — never check env vars directly
-->
